backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining types (NewsUpdate, UserProfile, WalletBalance, TokenMetric) and managing news updates, user profiles, cached token metrics, and access control with ICRC-1/ICRC-2 token balance queries.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: removing ProjectNewsUpdates component from App.tsx and removing 'News & Updates' navigation item from TopNavigation dropdown.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend components including App.tsx (main layout without ProjectNewsUpdates), Hero, Story, Footer, Games, TokenDashboard, and various UI components with styling and functionality details.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the BITTY ON ICP Meme Token webpage with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component with QueryClient and ThemeProvider, rendering TopNavigation and all page sections (Hero through LegalDisclaimer) with Socials fixed bar and Toaster notifications.
frontend/src/components/BittyFooter.tsx: Footer section component with animated background glow effects, displaying an image with ultra-pulse animation and bottom gradient fade.
Modal component displaying 'BITTY BLING COMING SOON' with neon-styled border, animated glow effects, close button, and image preview with backdrop blur.
frontend/src/components/ContractId.tsx: Component displaying the contract ID 'qroj6-lyaaa-aaaam-qeqta-cai' with copy-to-clipboard functionality, neon styling, and animated background effects.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedCharacte: Section displaying arcade-styled white text 'WHEN YOU'RE HODLING BITTY, YOUR HODLING HISTORY' with orange glow and a single autoplay looping video with neon ICP-themed border effects.
frontend/src/components/FireworksTitle.t: Canvas-based fireworks animation component that spawns ICP logo particles with rotation, velocity, and color effects. Particles are created at multiple spawn points with configurable timing and intensity.
Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/FloatingNewsUpda: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/FlyingTournament: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Minimal footer component that renders a simple footer element with padding.
frontend/src/components/Games.tsx: Games section displaying two arcade-style game links (BITTY DUCK BLAST and FLY BITTY FLY) with neon styling, animated blobs, and a Bitcoin miner arcade machine background image.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section with fireworks animation, hero image, tagline, and multiple CTA buttons for navigation (ICP info, token dashboard, games, roadmap, voting, bling, meme page). Includes ComingSoonModal integration.
frontend/src/components/HowToBuy.tsx: Empty component file with no content.
Legal disclaimer section stating that $BITTYICP is a meme coin with no intrinsic value, for entertainment purposes only.
frontend/src/components/LiveXFeed.tsx: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/Partnerships.tsx: Partnerships section displaying links to Oisy.com, Plug Wallet, and other ICP ecosystem partners with neon glow effects and hover animations.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/ProjectNewsUpdat: Carousel-based news updates section that fetches and displays project news from backend, sorting by timestamp and parsing content into sections with headings and bullet points.
frontend/src/components/ProjectWalletMod: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/ProjectWallets.t: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/ReceiveModal.tsx: Empty component file with no content.
Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/SendModal.tsx: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/Socials.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar displaying social media links (X, OpenChat, Telegram, YouTube) with neon styling and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/Story.tsx: Displays a three-card story section about Bitty's history, from Bitcoin's genesis to being the original crypto meme mascot and making a comeback on ICP. Uses gradient cards with hover effects and neon-styled text.
frontend/src/components/TokenDashboard.t: Fetches and displays live token metrics from Dexscreener API (price, volume, market cap) with auto-refresh every 30 seconds. Includes formatted number displays and loading/error states.
frontend/src/components/TopNavigation.ts: Fixed top navigation bar with a dropdown menu ('A BITTY MORE') containing links to sections, external pages, and a copyable contract ID. Includes smooth scrolling and a coming soon modal.
frontend/src/components/Whitepaper.tsx: Displays a roadmap section with animated background elements and a clickable 'THE JOURNEY' button that links to an external roadmap page. Features neon styling and glow effects.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous actor based on Internet Identity state. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity management, and status tracking using DFINITY's AuthClient. Includes a provider component and custom hook for accessing auth state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user profiles, news updates, wallet info, token balances, and ICRC-1 token transfers/swaps. Includes types for wallet operations and interfaces for ICRC-1 ledger interactions with ICP, ckBTC, and BittyICP tokens.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind imports, OKLCH color system for dark theme, neon color variables (pink, orange, cyan, purple), glow effects via drop-shadow filters, and custom animations (pulse-slow, blob).
frontend/src/lib/accountId.ts: Utility functions for converting ICP Principals to Account IDs using SHA-224 hashing and CRC32 checksums, plus token balance formatting and parsing helpers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both standard query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme with custom colors (neon variants, HSL-based design tokens), border radii, neon box shadows, and plugins for animations and typography.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking two completed features: removal of ProjectNewsUpdates component from App.tsx and removal of 'News & Updates' navigation item from TopNavigation.
